## Reusable Patterns

- Use a high-contrast card with editable copy layered outside generated imagery.
- Validate the mobile crop before final approval.

## Do Not Repeat

- Do not place tiny localized copy inside generated pixels.
- Do not rely on character consistency across separate generations.

## Approved Copy Blocks

- Charge this summer and receive the event benefit.

## Approved Structures

- Benefit, eligibility condition, and one call to action.

## Evidence

- 2026-07-10-summer-banner

## Revision History

- 2026-07-10 approved by Dongwon Lee after mobile review.
